note: Enrollment-level bootstrap on the held-out test set using fixed tuned-model predictions.
inferential_scope: Quantifies held-out test-set sampling variability conditional on fixed tuned models and fixed survival predictions.
supported_use: Use for uncertainty intervals and cautious directional rank-stability language inside the selected manuscript audit subset.
unsupported_use: Do not use as a retraining-based generalization claim, null-hypothesis test, or proof of universally fixed hierarchy.
